summary: Match Preview (Statistiche) feature testing completed. Backend API fully working (6/7 tests passed, 1 skipped). Frontend component correctly implemented. UI could not be fully verified because all matchdays are COMPLETED/LIVE which redirects to Live view instead of Predictions edit screen where the Statistiche button appears.

backend_match_preview_success.details: GET /api/stats/match-preview/{match_id} returns home_form (5), away_form (5), h2h (2), home_standing {rank:16, points:24}, away_standing {rank:19, points:15}

backend_match_preview_404.details: Returns 404 for invalid match_id with message 'Partita non trovata'

backend_home_form_structure.details: home_form contains W/D/L result badges, home_team, away_team, home_goals, away_goals

backend_h2h_structure.details: h2h array contains home_team, away_team, home_goals, away_goals

backend_standings_structure.details: home_standing/away_standing contain rank, points, played fields

backend_manual_match_400.details: No manual matches found in test database - all matches have external_fixture_id

frontend_stats_button_conditional_render.details: predictions.tsx line 539: {m.external_fixture_id && (...)} correctly renders Statistiche button only for API matches

frontend_match_preview_sheet.details: MatchPreviewSheet.tsx component correctly implements Modal with close button (data-testid='match-preview-close'), form badges, H2H scores, standings

frontend_live_screen_redirect.details: Predictions screen correctly redirects to Live view when matchday is LIVE/COMPLETED - Statistiche button only appears on OPEN matchday edit screen

backend_stats_endpoint.notes: Proper validation: 404 for missing match, 400 for missing external_fixture_id, 502 for API errors

frontend_conditional_render.notes: Statistiche button only rendered when m.external_fixture_id is truthy

frontend_bottom_sheet.notes: Uses React Native Modal with slide animation, overlay click to close, X button with data-testid

api_types.notes: external_fixture_id properly typed as number | null | undefined

critical_code_review_comments: All implementation is correct - no issues found
Statistiche button visibility is intentionally limited to OPEN matchday predictions screen
Manual matches correctly excluded via external_fixture_id check
context_for_next_testing_agent: Match preview feature fully implemented and tested. Backend API at /api/stats/match-preview/{match_id} works correctly. Frontend Statistiche button only appears on OPEN matchday predictions screen for API-imported matches. To test UI: need a league with an OPEN matchday containing API-imported matches. Current test matchdays are all COMPLETED which triggers redirect to Live view.
limitations_encountered: Could not perform full UI E2E test because all available matchdays are COMPLETED/LIVE status. The Predictions screen correctly redirects to Live view for these statuses, preventing access to the edit screen where the Statistiche button appears.
